salientSummary: Added 'devin' to AgentType union in src/types.ts, inserted alphabetically between 'deepagents' and 'droid'. grep -c confirms exactly 1 occurrence. All 402 tests pass. Type-check shows 7 errors: 6 pre-existing + 1 expected transient error (Property 'devin' missing in agents record) which will be resolved by the devin-config feature.
whatWasImplemented: Added '| 'devin'' as a string literal member of the AgentType union type in src/types.ts at line 17, positioned alphabetically between 'deepagents' and 'droid'.

discoveredIssues.description: Adding 'devin' to AgentType introduces 1 new type error in src/agents.ts(29,14): TS2741 Property 'devin' is missing in Record<AgentType, AgentConfig>. This is the expected transient state — the agents record requires an entry for every AgentType member, and the devin-config feature will add that entry.
discoveredIssues.suggestedFix: Will be resolved by devin-config feature adding the devin config entry to src/agents.ts

commandsRun.observation: Returns 1 — exactly one occurrence of 'devin' in the AgentType union
402 tests passed across 26 test files in 16.29s
7 errors total: 6 pre-existing + 1 expected transient (Property 'devin' missing in agents record, resolved by devin-config feature)

deviations.step: 2. Write failing tests first (TDD red phase)
deviations.whatIDidInstead: Skipped writing tests for this feature since it's a type-only change with no behavioral test surface. Verification is via grep and type-check, not unit tests.
deviations.why: The feature is adding a single string literal to a union type. There's no function to test — the verification steps are grep and type-check. Tests for the full agent (type + config + detection) are in the devin-unit-tests feature.
